narrative:
Bartlow Township has 1,384 registered voters, with 50.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.1 percentage points.
